name: Dumbbell Pullover
cues: Lie across a bench, one dumbbell overhead
Lower back into a deep lat stretch
Pull the elbows over, driving with the lats
execution_steps: Lie across a flat bench with only your upper back supported, feet planted and hips slightly below the bench.
Hold one dumbbell overhead with both hands, elbows slightly bent and fixed.
Lower the dumbbell back and down until you feel a deep stretch across the lats.
Pull it back over your chest by driving the elbows toward your hips with the lats.
good_when: You want a free-weight lat isolation that heavily loads the stretched position.
You only have dumbbells and a bench.
You want a stretch-focused finisher for back or chest day.
bad_when: Shoulder mobility limits make the deep overhead stretch painful.
You want constant tension throughout, since a cable pullover holds tension better near the top.
